name: Project ARVH-88 Total Artificial Heart Hardware Bill of Materials

implant_grade_metallurgy_and_substrates.specification: Extra Low Interstitial Alloy, Spherical Powder 15-45 microns, ASTM F136 Standard
implant_grade_metallurgy_and_substrates.purpose: Primary raw material for Direct Metal Laser Sintering (DMLS) of the ARVH-03 Ventricle Core

implant_grade_metallurgy_and_substrates.specification: Certified ISO 10993 Long-Term Blood Contact, Diameter: 1.75mm
implant_grade_metallurgy_and_substrates.purpose: Primary raw material for micro-extruding the non-conductive dielectric ARVH-02 sleeve

implant_grade_metallurgy_and_substrates.specification: Diameter: 3.0mm, Length: 100mm, High Density, Zero Porosity, Glassy Smooth Finish
implant_grade_metallurgy_and_substrates.purpose: Micro-machined to form the flush-mount, non-thrombogenic double-helical propulsion electrode tracks

implant_grade_metallurgy_and_substrates.specification: 99.999% Pure Acid Copper Bath, Semiconductor/Electronic Grade
implant_grade_metallurgy_and_substrates.purpose: Applies the 5-micron diamagnetic stabilization boundary beneath the blood-contact coating

electrodynamic_and_piezo_harvesting_hard.specification: Grade N52 Rare-Earth, Specialized Coaxial Segment, Axial Magnetization, 0.45 Tesla Peak Flux
electrodynamic_and_piezo_harvesting_hard.purpose: Provides the cross-field magnetic induction lines wrapping the ARVH-02 propulsion sleeve

electrodynamic_and_piezo_harvesting_hard.specification: Thickness: 28 microns, Poling Strain Vector d33: 33 pC/N, Vacuum-Deposited Silver Electrodes
electrodynamic_and_piezo_harvesting_hard.purpose: Populates the outer energy-harvesting muscular jacket layers to translate thoracic pulse strains

electrodynamic_and_piezo_harvesting_hard.specification: Fixed 3.3V Output, 500mA Continuous Capacity, Ultra-Low Quiescent Current, SOT-23 Package
electrodynamic_and_piezo_harvesting_hard.purpose: Clamps propulsion battery loops to a strict maximum ceiling to completely neutralize tissue heating

electrodynamic_and_piezo_harvesting_hard.specification: SMD Mini-DIP Package, Forward Current: 1A, Peak Repetitive Reverse Voltage: 1000V
electrodynamic_and_piezo_harvesting_hard.purpose: Flips variable high-voltage alternating current muscle compression pulses into raw harvesting DC

electrodynamic_and_piezo_harvesting_hard.specification: Breakdown Voltage: 3.3V, Ultra-Low Cap (<1pF), SOD-323 Package
electrodynamic_and_piezo_harvesting_hard.purpose: Absorbs and short-circuits microscopic fluidic static charges along the blood tracks

surgical_consumables_and_seals.specification: Concentric Dual O-Ring Profile, Cross-Section: 1.5mm, Hardness Durometer: 70A, USP Class VI
surgical_consumables_and_seals.purpose: Establishes a permanent hermetic pressure seal boundary at inter-chamber chassis split-lines

surgical_consumables_and_seals.specification: High-Purity Poly(chloro-p-xylylene), USP Class VI Biocompatible Dielectric Insulation
surgical_consumables_and_seals.purpose: Deposited via vacuum chamber to create the seamless 50-micron uniform blood-contact isolation barrier

surgical_consumables_and_seals.specification: NuSil MED-1000 Standard, Translucent, High-Tensile Structural Bond, USP Class VI
surgical_consumables_and_seals.purpose: Hermetically seals external electronic wiring outlets exiting the titanium enclosure case
